holdings.infoBox: HELX is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are Guardant Health stock at 8.65%, Natera at 6.89%, Krystal Biotech at 6.44%, Ligand Pharmaceuticals at 4.26%, and United Therapeutics at 3.95%.

overview.description: The Franklin Genomic Advancements ETF (HELX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of global equity securities of companies relevant to genomic discovery. HELX was launched on Feb 25, 2020 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
